_meta.description: S4 inference proposals — HYPOTHESES, sourcing-gated. NEVER auto-promoted; review + source + promote by hand.

sibc.entity: Advances against Fixed Deposits (Including FCNR (B), NRNR Deposits etc.)
Weaker Sections including net PSLC- SF/MF

proposals.label: Monetary policy transmission → credit demand elasticity
proposals.mechanism: Repo rate cuts or improved transmission mechanism lowers lending rates, increasing credit demand across rate-sensitive segments
proposals.required_source: RBI Monetary Policy Committee meeting minutes and repo rate announcements for 2025-2026

proposals.label: Credit guarantee scheme expansion → priority sector origination
proposals.mechanism: Extension of ECLGS or launch of new government credit guarantee schemes reduces bank risk perception for priority sector lending
proposals.required_source: Ministry of Finance notifications on ECLGS extensions or new credit guarantee scheme announcements for 2025-2026

proposals.label: Risk weight recalibration → sectoral lending capacity
proposals.mechanism: RBI reduces risk weights for specific sectors or asset classes, improving regulatory capital efficiency for those exposures
proposals.required_source: RBI circulars on risk weight modifications for different asset classes in 2025-2026

proposals.label: Account Aggregator framework adoption → underwriting efficiency
proposals.mechanism: Increased adoption of AA framework reduces customer acquisition costs and enables faster credit decisions for retail segments
proposals.required_source: NPCI or RBI reports on Account Aggregator transaction volumes and participating entities for 2025-2026

proposals.label: Union Budget allocation increase → sectoral credit demand
proposals.mechanism: Increased budget allocations or subsidies for specific sectors create downstream credit demand from beneficiaries
proposals.required_source: Union Budget 2025-26 documents showing sectoral allocation changes compared to previous year

proposals.label: UPI infrastructure mandate → QR acceptance substitution
proposals.mechanism: RBI mandates for UPI-QR standardization and interoperability crowd out proprietary Bharat QR deployments as merchants consolidate to NPCI standard QR codes.
proposals.required_source: NPCI UPI ecosystem guidelines and RBI Master Direction on Payment and Settlement Systems

proposals.label: Bank branch rationalization policy → ATM location optimization
proposals.mechanism: RBI guidelines on branch presence and cash management efficiency drive banks to concentrate ATM infrastructure on-site at remaining branches rather than maintaining dispersed off-site networks.
proposals.required_source: RBI Guidelines on Branch Authorisation and bank branch licensing policies issued post-COVID

proposals.label: Credit card cash advance regulation → ATM withdrawal compression
proposals.mechanism: RBI directions on credit card cash advance limits and higher fee structures suppress ATM cash withdrawal usage in favor of card-present transactions.
proposals.required_source: RBI Master Direction on Credit Card and Debit Card Operations Section on cash advance limits and fees

proposals.label: Payment aggregator licensing costs → micro-infrastructure exit
proposals.mechanism: New PA licensing framework with higher compliance costs forces smaller payment infrastructure providers to exit micro-ATM and rural POS deployment.
proposals.required_source: RBI Guidelines on Regulation of Payment Aggregators and Payment Gateways issued in March 2021 and subsequent amendments

proposals.label: E-commerce transaction fees → ticket size compression
proposals.mechanism: Higher acquirer fees on small-value e-commerce transactions drive merchants to implement minimum transaction thresholds, compressing average ticket size while increasing volume through order bundling.
proposals.required_source: NPCI and merchant acquirer fee schedules for e-commerce transactions and RBI data on transaction value distributions

proposals.label: RuPay interchange incentive → debit channel preference
proposals.mechanism: NPCI interchange rate structures favor specific debit card usage channels (e-commerce vs POS vs ATM) through differential merchant discount rates, shifting transaction flow between channels.
proposals.required_source: NPCI RuPay Merchant Discount Rate structure and interchange fee schedules published annually

proposals.label: Digital lending integration → card utilization patterns
proposals.mechanism: NBFC digital lending partnerships with card networks create new credit utilization channels that appear in 'other' transaction categories, changing traditional spend pattern distributions.
proposals.required_source: RBI Guidelines on Digital Lending through online platforms and fintech partnership disclosures by major card issuers

proposals.label: Dynamic credit limit revision → utilization capacity
proposals.mechanism: Banks adjust credit card limits based on spending velocity and transaction patterns, directly affecting maximum possible outstanding balances
proposals.required_source: RBI Master Direction on Credit Card and Debit Card - Issuance and Conduct or individual bank credit policy disclosures on dynamic limit adjustments

proposals.label: Cash advance fee structure → balance composition
proposals.mechanism: Higher cash advance fees and interest rates cause borrowers to shift between ATM withdrawals and POS spending, affecting revolving balance accumulation patterns
proposals.required_source: Bank credit card fee schedules or RBI data on cash advance vs purchase transaction proportions and their differential pricing

proposals.label: Minimum payment calculation method → revolving balance persistence
proposals.mechanism: Changes in minimum payment calculation rules affect how quickly outstanding balances are paid down relative to new spending flows
proposals.required_source: RBI circular on minimum payment calculation methods or banking industry guidelines on revolving credit payment structures

proposals.label: Merchant category blocking → spending channel substitution
proposals.mechanism: Regulatory or risk-based restrictions on certain merchant categories force spend to alternative channels, affecting overall utilization patterns
proposals.required_source: RBI notifications on merchant category restrictions or bank risk management policies on transaction category limits

proposals.label: Billing cycle harmonization → payment timing synchronization
proposals.mechanism: Industry standardization of billing cycles affects the timing relationship between spending flows and balance reporting periods
proposals.required_source: Banking industry association guidelines on billing cycle standardization or RBI data collection methodology changes for credit card reporting
